meta.prepared_by: Generated by TestSprite, updated for PRD v4

product_overview: Vido is an all-in-one self-hosted media management interface for Traditional Chinese NAS users. It integrates media discovery, subtitle automation (multi-source search + OpenCC conversion), download management, and NAS health monitoring via a pluggable architecture that replaces fragmented *arr stack + Seerr combinations. Single-user, no authentication required.
core_goals: Provide a dedicated Traditional Chinese subtitle engine: multi-source search (Assrt, Zimuku, OpenSubtitles), correct Simplified/Traditional detection via content analysis, OpenCC conversion with Taiwan terminology, and proper file extension normalization for Plex/Jellyfin/Infuse
Accurately parse complex filenames (fansub and standard) using AI-assisted parsing and learn user corrections over time
Scan media library folders recursively, auto-match to TMDB with Traditional Chinese metadata priority and multi-source fallback (Douban, Wikipedia)
Offer a usable web UI: media library browsing (poster wall with search/sort/filter), subtitle search & batch processing, settings, and connection health monitoring
Pluggable integration architecture: work standalone without external tools, or integrate with Sonarr/Radarr/Plex/Jellyfin/qBittorrent via Go plugin interfaces
Real-time updates via SSE (Server-Sent Events) replacing polling for download progress and scan status

features.name: Media Library
features.description: Browse and manage the scanned media collection with poster-wall grid view, type filters (All/Movie/TV), sorting (title/year/added date), search, and item-level actions via context menu (re-parse, delete, search subtitles). Supports detail side panel for viewing metadata.
user_flows: Navigate to /library -> View poster wall grid of media items -> Use search bar to filter by title -> Filter by type (All/Movie/TV) -> Sort by year or added date -> Click a poster card to open detail panel -> View metadata (title, poster, genres, rating, overview) -> Close panel

Navigate to /library -> Right-click (desktop) or long-press (mobile) a poster card -> See context menu with options: Search Subtitles, Re-parse Metadata, Delete -> Click Delete -> Confirm in dialog -> See item removed
Navigate to /library -> Right-click a poster card -> Click 'Search Subtitles' -> Subtitle search dialog opens for that media item
Navigate to /library -> No media in library -> See empty state with guidance to configure scanner settings

features.name: Subtitle Search
features.description: Search subtitles from multiple sources (Assrt, Zimuku, OpenSubtitles) for a single movie or episode. Shows results with score badge, source, language, format, and hearing-impaired indicator. User can select and download the best subtitle.
user_flows: From media library or detail panel -> Click 'Search Subtitles' -> Subtitle search dialog opens -> See search results from multiple sources -> Results show: score badge, source icon, title, language tag, format (SRT/ASS), HI badge -> Click a result to download -> See download confirmation
Open subtitle search for a media item -> No subtitles found -> See 'No subtitles found' empty state message
Open subtitle search for a TV series -> Select season/episode -> Search results appear for that specific episode

features.name: Batch Subtitle Processing
features.description: Batch search and download subtitles for all episodes of a full season or entire library at once. Shows progress with status per episode.
user_flows: From TV series detail -> Click 'Batch Search Subtitles' -> Processing begins for all episodes -> See progress indicator per episode -> See completion summary

features.name: Media Detail Panel
features.description: Side panel (desktop) or sheet (mobile) presenting full metadata for a movie or TV show: title, poster, genres, rating, overview, cast/crew credits. Includes context menu for actions and subtitle search entry point.
user_flows: Click a media item in library -> Side panel opens with title, poster, genres, rating, overview -> See cast/crew credits section -> See 'Search Subtitles' button -> Click to open subtitle search
Open detail panel -> Right-click or click context menu -> See options: Search Subtitles, Re-parse Metadata, Delete
On mobile -> Tap media item -> Bottom sheet opens with same metadata -> Swipe down to dismiss

features.name: Search (TMDB)
features.description: Search TMDb for movies and TV shows with Traditional Chinese prioritized results. Results link to media detail. Minimum 1 character query length.
features.v4_status: Partially DONE (Epic 2 basic search), will be expanded in Phase 2 (Epic 11 Advanced Search)
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Type query (>=1 character) -> See paginated results -> Click a result -> Navigate to /media/:type/:id detail page -> See Traditional Chinese title, poster, year, genres
Navigate to /search -> Type query -> TMDb API returns error -> See error state with retry option
Navigate to /search -> Filter results by Movie or TV type tabs

features.name: Downloads Monitor
features.description: Monitor qBittorrent downloads with status filtering (all/downloading/paused/completed/seeding/error), sorting, and progress display. Currently uses polling (5s interval); will migrate to SSE in Phase 3.
features.v4_status: DONE (Epic 4), will be enhanced in Phase 3 (Epic 14 Download Management v2 with SSE)
user_flows: Navigate to /downloads -> See list of torrents with progress bars -> Click filter tab 'Downloading' -> See only downloading items -> Click a torrent row for inline details (ETA, speed)
Navigate to /downloads -> Click filter tab 'Completed' -> No completed downloads -> See empty state with 'Scan completed downloads' call-to-action -> Click scan -> See toast notification
Navigate to /downloads -> Sort by Name or Progress -> See ordering change

features.name: qBittorrent Settings
features.description: Configure qBittorrent connection (host, username, password), test the connection, and save the configuration.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/qbittorrent -> Fill Host, Username, Password -> Click Test Connection -> See success with qBittorrent version -> Click Save -> See confirmation
Navigate to /settings/qbittorrent -> Enter invalid host -> Click Test Connection -> See inline error 'Connection failed' with guidance -> Save remains disabled until test succeeds

features.name: Connection Health Monitoring
features.description: Real-time qBittorrent connection health indicator with a clickable history modal showing timestamped events and event-type filtering.
features.v4_status: DONE (Epic 4), will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18 multi-service health)
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See QB health indicator showing 'connected' (green) -> Click indicator -> Open connection history modal -> See timestamped events -> Filter by 'errors'
Navigate to / -> QB health degraded -> See indicator in 'degraded' state -> Click -> See history with error events

features.name: Scanner Settings
features.description: Configure media library scanner: set scan paths, trigger manual scan, view scan status and results.
features.v4_status: Partially DONE (Epic 5 manual scan), scheduled scan NEW (Epic 7)
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/scanner -> See configured scan paths -> Add a new path -> Click 'Scan Now' -> See scan progress -> See scan results (new files found, matched, errors)
Navigate to /settings/scanner -> Configure scheduled scan frequency (hourly/daily) -> Save settings

features.name: Manual Metadata Search
features.description: From media detail, manually search alternate metadata sources and apply selected metadata when automatic parsing fails or is incorrect.
user_flows: From media detail -> Click 'Manual Search' -> Type search query -> See results from multiple sources -> Click a result -> Apply -> See updated metadata
Manual search returns no results -> See 'No matches found' -> Click 'Edit manually' -> Make edits -> Save

features.name: Pattern Learning
features.description: System learns filename patterns from user corrections for future automatic parsing. Users can view learned patterns with statistics and delete patterns.
user_flows: Correct metadata in editor -> After save, prompted 'Save pattern?' -> Click Save Pattern -> Pattern recorded with usage stats
Navigate to settings -> View Learned Patterns list -> See patterns with usage statistics -> Delete a pattern -> See it removed

features.name: Settings Hub
features.description: Centralized settings with multiple sections: Connection (API keys), qBittorrent, Scanner, Performance, Cache, Logs, System Status, Backup.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> See settings navigation with sections -> Click into each section -> Configure and save
Navigate to /settings/backup -> Export configuration -> Download backup file
Navigate to /settings/logs -> View activity logs -> Filter by type

routes.description: Home page with download status, recent media, connection health indicator. Will become TV Wall in Phase 2 (Epic 10).
Browse media library with poster-wall grid view, type filtering (All/Movie/TV), sorting, search, and context menu actions
Search movies and TV shows via TMDb with type filtering and pagination. Will be expanded to Advanced Search in Phase 2 (Epic 11).
Monitor qBittorrent downloads with status filtering and sorting. Will be enhanced with SSE in Phase 3 (Epic 14).
Settings hub with sub-routes for connection, qbittorrent, scanner, performance, cache, logs, status, backup
Configure qBittorrent connection settings with test connection
Configure media library scan paths and trigger manual scans
Configure API connections and external service endpoints
Media detail panel showing movie or TV show metadata, credits, context menu, and subtitle search entry point
Initial setup flow for first-time configuration

features.name: Media Library
features.description: Poster-wall media browsing with grid view, search, sort, filter, and context menu actions
user_interactions: View poster wall grid of media items
Search by title
Filter media by type (All/Movie/TV)
Sort by title, year, or added date
Right-click poster card for context menu (Search Subtitles, Re-parse, Delete)
Click poster card to open detail panel
Navigate pages via pagination

features.name: Subtitle Search
features.description: Multi-source subtitle search with scoring, language detection, and download
user_interactions: Open subtitle search dialog from context menu or detail panel
View search results with score, source, language, format, HI badge
Select and download a subtitle
See empty state when no subtitles found

features.name: Media Detail
features.description: Side panel showing full movie or TV show metadata with subtitle search integration
user_interactions: View movie or TV show metadata (title, poster, genres, rating, overview)
View cast and crew credits
Click 'Search Subtitles' button to open subtitle search dialog
Open context menu for actions (Search Subtitles, Re-parse, Delete)
Close panel to navigate back

features.name: Search
features.description: Search movies and TV shows via TMDb with Traditional Chinese results
user_interactions: Type search query in search bar (minimum 1 character)
Filter results by type (All/Movie/TV)
Browse paginated results
Click result to view media detail

features.name: Downloads Monitor
features.description: Monitor qBittorrent downloads with real-time status updates and filtering
user_interactions: Filter downloads by status (all/downloading/paused/completed/seeding/error)
Sort downloads by field (added_on/name/progress/status)
View real-time download progress (5-second polling)
See empty state when no downloads match filter

features.name: qBittorrent Settings
features.description: Configure and test qBittorrent connection with host, username, and password
user_interactions: Enter qBittorrent host URL
Enter username
Enter password
Click Test Connection to validate
See connection test result (success with version or error)
Click Save to persist configuration

features.name: Connection Health Monitoring
features.description: Real-time qBittorrent connection health indicator with history panel
user_interactions: View health status indicator (connected/degraded/disconnected)
Click indicator to open connection history modal
View history of connection events with timestamps
Filter history by event type

features.name: Manual Metadata Search
features.description: Search and apply metadata manually when automatic parsing fails
user_interactions: Open manual search from metadata editor or detail panel
Type search query for metadata
Browse search results from multiple sources
Select and apply correct metadata

features.name: Pattern Learning
features.description: System learns filename patterns from user corrections for future automatic parsing
user_interactions: Prompted to save pattern after manual correction
View learned patterns list with statistics
Delete a learned pattern
See auto-apply notification when pattern is reused

known_limitations.issue: Subtitle search UI is under active development (Epic 8 in progress)
known_limitations.impact: Subtitle search dialog may change as remaining stories are implemented

known_limitations.issue: Home page is still v3 dashboard; will be replaced by TV Wall in Phase 2
known_limitations.impact: Dashboard tests will become obsolete when Epic 10 is implemented

known_limitations.issue: Download monitoring uses 5s polling; SSE migration planned for Phase 3
No authentication system — v4 is single-user by design
known_limitations.impact: All routes are publicly accessible, auth was explicitly removed in v4

known_limitations.issue: Search is basic TMDB search; Advanced Search with multi-facet filtering planned for Phase 2
known_limitations.impact: Search UI will be significantly enhanced in Epic 11

known_limitations.issue: Settings restructured from single qBittorrent page to multi-section hub
known_limitations.impact: Learned Patterns is now under settings hub, not under /settings/qbittorrent

deleted_features: Multi-user accounts and permissions — deferred to v5.0
new_features: Subtitle Engine (Epic 8): multi-source search, OpenCC conversion, content-based language detection
Plugin Architecture: Go interfaces for MediaServer/Downloader/DVR plugins
SSE Hub: Server-Sent Events replacing polling
Media Library Scanner (Epic 7): folder scanning, TMDB auto-match
TV Wall Homepage (Epic 10): Hero banner, customizable explore sections
Advanced Search (Epic 11): multi-facet filtering, persistent filter pills
Rich Media Detail (Epic 12): dual ratings, season/episode list, streaming platform info
Request System (Epic 13): one-click request with Sonarr/Radarr integration
NAS Dashboard (Epic 16-18): media stats, Plex/Jellyfin integration, service health

phase_structure.phase_1: 字幕核心穩定 (Subtitle Core MVP) — scanner + subtitle engine
phase_structure.phase_2: 媒體探索 (Media Discovery) — TV Wall + advanced search + rich detail
phase_structure.phase_3: 請求流程 + 下載管理 (Request System + Download Management)
phase_structure.phase_4: NAS Dashboard (Stats + Media Server + Health Monitoring)
